_doc: Builder — Act 3 ally automation. Visual: yellow body + hard-hat + wrench. Per the redefined Builder role (see PROTOTYPE_STATUS.md §4 spec divergence note 2026-05-07): pulls from the pad's stockpile (NOT the player's stack) and runs to active ghost zones. PR #3.1 visuals only; PR #3.3 adds AI. role 'disabled' so WorkerAISystem skips it.
